ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, WR, CB) */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university attended by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "years_in_league" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the league */,
  "average_value" REAL /* Average value of the player's contracts */,
  "drafted_by" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player (including round and year) */,
  "height_feet" INTEGER /* Height of the player in feet */,
  "height_inches" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight_pounds" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "current_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current team the player is with */,
  "pro_bowls" INTEGER /* Number of Pro Bowl selections */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_current_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., AFC, NFC) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., East, North, South, West) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founder_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coach" TEXT /* Name of the assistant coach */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team president */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the contract belongs to */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "signing_bonus" REAL /* Signing bonus for the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary for the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired, void) */,
  "performance_bonus" REAL /* Performance bonus amount */,
  "guaranteed_amount" REAL /* Guaranteed amount of the contract */,
  "incentives" TEXT /* Description of any incentives included in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., individual, team) */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Position played by the player (e.g., QB, WR, CB)
